nodes.name: Emilie Snethlage

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Snethlage's tody-tyrant (Hemitriccus minor) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Venezuela, and possibly Peru.Remsen, J
